hero.name: Sk. Roushan Khalid
hero.philosophy: “Learning to engineer practical AI systems through real-world software development and continuous hands-on growth.”

about.lead: I'm a recent Software Engineering graduate (B.Sc., Daffodil International University) currently working as an AI Engineer at Kamal-Paterson Ltd, where I get to build and ship real AI-powered systems.
paragraphs: My work sits at the intersection of applied machine learning, backend engineering, and LLM-based applications. I'm actively building experience in production-grade software — learning how AI systems actually behave at scale, not just in notebooks.

I'm honest about where I am: early career, still growing. But I'm doing that growing inside real industry problems — from RAG pipelines to full-stack agritech platforms — and I take every challenge seriously.
I value environments where I can learn fast, contribute meaningfully, and work alongside people who care about building things well. Mentorship and engineering culture matter a lot to me.
focusItems: System design for scalable AI apps

skills.title: Applied AI & Machine Learning
skills.description: Building practical ML systems that solve real problems — from data pipelines to model deployment. Focused on what works in production, not just benchmarks.

skills.title: Backend Systems & APIs
skills.description: Designing and building backend infrastructure for AI products — RESTful APIs, database integrations, auth, and containerized deployments.

skills.title: LLM Applications & RAG
skills.description: Integrating large language models into real applications — retrieval-augmented generation, intelligent assistants, and bilingual AI interfaces.

skills.title: Multi-Agent & AI Orchestration
skills.description: Exploring and building multi-agent systems for task automation and structured AI workflows. Learning how agent coordination works at a systems level.

skills.title: Computer Vision
skills.description: Applied CV work — gesture recognition, image-based classification, and vision workflows for domain-specific use cases like agritech and health monitoring.

skills.title: Data-Driven Applications
skills.description: From analysis and visualization to intelligent automation systems that use data to drive decisions and actions.

skills.title: AI-Assisted Development
skills.description: Proficient in working with AI coding tools to accelerate development, improve code quality, and explore solutions faster. Comfortable integrating these tools into real daily workflows.

timeline.title: AI Engineer · Kamal-Paterson Ltd / KPCloud
timeline.description: Working on agritech AI systems — full-stack development, backend APIs, computer vision features, and applied AI components. Getting real exposure to how production systems are designed and maintained.

timeline.title: Research Intern · Learnix Research Lab
timeline.description: Part-time research internship exploring applied ML research. Working on bridging academic research with practical implementations and deepening understanding of ML foundations.

timeline.title: B.Sc. Software Engineering · Daffodil International University
timeline.description: Major in Data Science. Graduated with 3.62/4.00 CGPA. Built strong foundations in software engineering, data science, and practical AI systems alongside academic coursework.

contributions.title: Backend systems for AI products
contributions.description: I can design and build the API and backend layer that AI features run on — from database schemas to FastAPI endpoints to containerized service setups.

contributions.title: LLM integration & RAG pipelines
contributions.description: I've built RAG systems from scratch — document ingestion, vector retrieval, prompt engineering, and connecting it all to production APIs with real user-facing interfaces.

contributions.title: Data handling & AI workflows
contributions.description: Structuring data flows, building intelligent automation pipelines, and integrating external data sources (weather APIs, geospatial data, time-series) into AI systems.

contributions.title: AI feature development support
contributions.description: I can contribute to AI feature R&D — prototyping, evaluating models, iterating on system behavior, and helping translate research ideas into working implementations.

contributions.title: Cross-functional thinking
contributions.description: I've contributed across agritech, health data, and smart farming domains. I can think about the product context around AI features, not just the model itself.

contributions.title: Fast learning & adaptation
contributions.description: I pick up new tools, frameworks, and problem domains quickly. I've shipped across Python, Dart, React, PHP, and SQL in real products — adaptability is a real strength.

philosophy.title: Learn by building real systems
philosophy.description: The best way to understand something is to ship it, break it, and fix it. I don't wait for perfection before building.

philosophy.title: Simplicity over complexity
philosophy.description: If a simpler solution works, it's the better solution. I try not to reach for complexity before I've exhausted simpler approaches.

philosophy.title: Consistency over intensity
philosophy.description: Steady, daily progress compounds faster than burst energy. I care more about showing up consistently than occasional heroics.

philosophy.title: Real-world impact over hype
philosophy.description: AI is only valuable when it solves real problems for real people. I'm not chasing trends — I'm interested in what actually works.

contact.footerNote: Based in Dhaka, Bangladesh · Open to remote & onsite roles
